stemHtml: An aircraft is executing an approach on runway 22 followed by a visual manoeuvering (circling) on runway 04. During the circling, the crew loses visual references with runway 04. What are the steps to be followed?

options.a: (1) Climb toward runway 04, (2) reach the minimum circling altitude or higher, (3) initiate the missed approach procedure for runway 22.
options.b: (1) Climb toward runway 22, (2) reach the minimum circling altitude or higher, (3) initiate the missed approach procedure for runway 04.
options.c: (1) Climb toward runway 04, (2) reach a lower altitude than the minimum circling altitude, (3) initiate the missed approach procedure for runway 22.
options.d: (1) Climb toward runway 22, (2) reach a lower altitude than the minimum circling altitude, (3) initiate the missed approach procedure for runway 04.
